_comment: NPC: Li Muwan (李慕婉). Canon ID: N17. Per user directive: every miscellaneous NPC from RI must be accounted for. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Li Muwan
personality: gentle, devoted; Wang Lin's primary love interest

perception_tiers.core_formation: Treading Heaven Realm; Wang Lin's wife
perception_tiers.nascent_soul: Treading Heaven; Wang Lin's primary love

note: Wang Lin's primary love interest; transcended together

dao_heart.note: 0-100. A cracked Dao heart blocks breakthrough regardless of Qi. Per canon: Wang Lin's Dao heart is famously tested at every major realm.

initiation_lines: You must be new to the alchemy hall. I am Li Muwan. If you bring me herbs and reagents, I can refine pills. The Heng Yue Sect's alchemy has declined in recent years. I intend to restore it.
Wang Lin once sat where you stand. He was not the most talented disciple. He was the most determined. That matters more than talent.
The Soul Refining Sect's alchemists use souls as reagents. I use spirit herbs. The difference is not efficiency. It is what you are willing to sacrifice.
Bread and wheat for sustenance, or coal and bottles if you seek refined pills. Alchemy requires both patience and materials.

sect_tasks.name: Herb Pill Refinement
sect_tasks.description: Li Muwan needs bread and wheat to sustain herself during long alchemy sessions, and coal and bottles for the refinement furnace.

sect_tasks.name: Alchemy Reagent Supply
sect_tasks.description: Li Muwan needs paper and ink to record alchemy formulas, and emeralds to purchase rare reagents from traveling merchants.
